programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: The Inland Enforcement Team track down an alleged German sex offender a detector dog sniffs out trouble in an unclaimed suitcase from Dubai.

programme.title: Customs
programme.desc: At Gatwick, officers get a tip-off and are on the lookout for a passenger previously charged with importing drugs by surgically stitching them into a live Labrador.

programme.title: Customs
programme.desc: Customs officers board a suspicious yacht off Cornwall and receive an angry welcome in Dover, officers searching under a truck find an illegal immigrant hiding on top of the engine.

programme.title: Customs
programme.desc: A ton of cannabis concealed in a truck is discovered at Dover and an intimate search gets to the bottom of a suspected heroin smuggler at Gatwick.

programme.title: Customs
programme.desc: In Dover, a giant X-ray machine helps officers tackle industrial scale smugglers hoping to hide amongst the thousands of trucks flooding through the port each day.

programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: A Russian dissident's complicated past raises questions for officers a Korean tourist's resume and school diplomas raise eyebrows.

programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: A Canadian wanted in Alberta is stopped en route to Ecuador a parcel of baby food contains surprising ingredients.

programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: The Inland Enforcement Team track down an alleged German sex offender a detector dog sniffs out trouble in an unclaimed suitcase from Dubai.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Avalanche risk turns deadly after a skier is caught in unstable snow the SAR team must use helicopters and controlled detonations to prevent further slides before attempting the rescue.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: When three calls come in within hours, Teton County Search and Rescue faces its toughest day yet a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and a looming avalanche all demand immediate response.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: The team races to find two overdue snowmobilers in the remote backcountry in harsh, low-visibility conditions.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: The team races to save a teen who drove a snowmobile off a cliff. A rookie is tested in a high-stakes rescue.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: The Westpac Rescue Crew help a skydiver whose parachute has failed, and a ten-year-old who is thrown off his motorbike.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: The Westpac Rescue Crew help a girl who is suffering a suspected spinal injury from surfing, and winch a German tourist to safety from the edge of a cliff.
